pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21 to match the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles for Java 17, failing the requirement to produce Java 21 bytecode and potentially missing JDK 21 specific language features or optimizations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM from version 2.8.2.Final to 3.19.4 to support Java 21 and modern Quarkus features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 2.x does not support Java 21; upgrading to Quarkus 3.x is required for runtime compatibility with JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated quarkus-resteasy dependency with the new quarkus-rest and quarkus-rest-jackson dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: The quarkus-resteasy extension is removed in Quarkus 3; using it causes compile errors or missing class exceptions at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin from 3.8.1 to 3.14.0 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting Java 21 or handle new language features correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-surefire-plugin from 3.0.0-M5 to 3.5.2 to ensure test execution compatibility with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to launch or execute tests on Java 21 due to internal API changes or module system restrictions.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Update the Docker base image from UBI8/OpenJDK 11 to UBI9/OpenJDK 21 to align with the target JDK version.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.why_exists: The application requires JDK 21 runtime features; running on JDK 11 will result in runtime errors or missing class definitions for Java 21 APIs.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Upgrade the Docker base image from UBI8/OpenJDK 11 to UBI9/OpenJDK 21 to match the target JDK version.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.why_exists: The application requires JDK 21 runtime features; running on JDK 11 will result in runtime errors or missing class definitions.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Switch from JAVA_OPTS to JAVA_OPTS_APPEND to align with the new container entrypoint script's variable handling.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.why_exists: The new entrypoint script (run-java.sh) may ignore JAVA_OPTS or handle it differently (e.g., overriding defaults), causing application configuration to be lost or misconfigured at runtime.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Explicitly define the entrypoint to use the JBoss container run script.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.why_exists: Without the explicit entrypoint, the container may not execute the application correctly or apply necessary JVM tuning provided by the run-java.sh script in the new base image.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native-micro.general_idea: Switch the base image to the UBI 9 variant compatible with Java 21 and Quarkus 3.x native builds.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native-micro.why_exists: The old base image (v1.0) is based on an older OS/JDK version incompatible with Java 21 native binaries; using it results in runtime failures or missing libraries.
